name: GIANTS-1 immune-aging trial is recruiting with no posted results
summary: A direct immune-aging registry adds watchlist coverage but no efficacy evidence because results are not posted.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov listed GIANTS-1 as a recruiting phase 2a trial of GI-102 plus GIB-7 with NK-cell, CD8 T-cell, safety, physical-function, cognition, microbiome, and health-event endpoints, but no posted results as of June 11, 2026.
population_or_model: Healthy adults and cancer survivors aged 18 to 80 years
caveats: Recruiting registry status is not evidence of benefit.
The trial is small and combines an immunocytokine with a synbiotic formula.
Healthy adults and cancer survivors may need separate interpretation if results are posted.
